c.d: The total number of active users or downloads, indicating the app's popularity and reach.
Supported operating systems and device types (e.g., Android, iOS, browser-based) to assess accessibility.
Availability of features such as virtual gifts, ads, subscriptions, sponsorships, and e-commerce integration for creators.
Maximum supported streaming video resolution and quality for live broadcasts.
Features enabling audience engagement such as live chat, multi-guest streams, audio-only rooms, and live games.
Advanced capabilities like multi-camera feeds, real-time editing, branding customization for polished streams.
Cost structure including free use, in-app purchases, subscription tiers, or pay-per-use plans.
